Among the deals, you can find the tried-and-true 3,600Wh DELTA Pro Portable Power Station with 2x 220W solar panels for $2,149 shipped, with the closest matching Amazon bundle being the station with a 400W solar panel for $150 more. Normally $5,199 at full price, we saw this bundle only discounted as low as $2,279 in 2025, while 2026 has seen one previous offer to the $2,149 low. That all-time low price is coming back around during this sale for $3,050 savings. You can also find the solo station down at $1,799 shipped, which is beaten by Amazon’s $1,699 pricing.
